underlying_goal: Execute phase 57.3 (audit workflow infrastructure) end-to-end: implement plans, collect signals, handle CI/PR release flow
friction_detail: Git sensor missed a fix commit as signal-worthy and Claude initially defended the omission before user pushed back on the threshold for signal recording.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to execute phase 57.3 and run the full release flow including signals, CI, PR merge, and cleanup — all completed successfully despite needing user correction on signal sensitivity thresholds.
